title: canthium brunneum
intro: Canthium brunneum, also known as the yellow fever berry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits associated with Canthium brunneum include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential use in the management of malaria and other diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and its leaves, bark, and berries are commonly used to create remedies for various health conditions.
